brand.fontFamily: -apple-system, system-ui, Segoe UI, Noto Sans, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji

workflow.name: Open a new issue
workflow.description: Track bugs, suggest enhancements, or manage tasks within a repository to keep development organized and transparent.

steps.title: Select Repository
steps.description: Select a repository from your list to open a new issue in.

steps.title: Go to Issues
steps.description: Click on the 'Issues' tab to view existing issues and create new ones.

steps.title: Click New Issue
steps.description: Click the 'New issue' button to start creating a new issue.

steps.title: Add a title
steps.description: Enter a descriptive title for your issue.

steps.title: Add a description
steps.description: Provide more details about the issue in the description field.

steps.title: Submit Issue
steps.description: Click the 'Create' button to submit your new issue.
